questions: If Yes, how long has the patient been symptomatic? (in hours)
Does the patient have a solitary large stone? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have multiple small stones with a wide cystic duct? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have a porcelain gall bladder? (Yes/No)
Is the patient an anxious patient? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have acute cholecystitis? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have empyema gall bladder? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have stones in the CBD? (Yes/No)
Is an anaerobic bacterial infection suspected or anticipated? (Yes/No)
Does the patient require pain management? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have obstructive jaundice? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have evidence of persistent infection? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have an indwelling tube (e.g., T-tube)? (Yes/No)
